cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this. The question is asking which of the given options is true according to the passage. First, I need to recall the passage details. Option B: "In Holland people give presents to unbirthday persons on their birthdays." The passage says, "In Holland, children not only get presents, but also give things out. They give cakes, cookies and candles to their classmates and teachers on their birthdays." Wait, "unbirthday persons" is a term I'm not sure about.
